steps_breakdown.name: Source File Validation & Content Ingestion
steps_breakdown.description: Verify source file availability and load article content

steps_breakdown.name: Terminology & Named Entity Recognition
steps_breakdown.description: Identify proper nouns, brand names, technical terms, and domain-specific vocabulary

steps_breakdown.name: Article Structure Analysis
steps_breakdown.description: Parse article structure (headlines, sections, lists, code blocks, quotes)

steps_breakdown.name: Initial Translation
steps_breakdown.description: Execute primary translation from English to Chinese with terminology mapping

steps_breakdown.name: Translation Quality Review
steps_breakdown.description: Check translation accuracy, fluency, consistency, and proper term usage

steps_breakdown.name: Markdown Format Validation
steps_breakdown.description: Verify Markdown syntax, links, images, code blocks preservation, and formatting

steps_breakdown.name: Final Proofreading & Optimization
steps_breakdown.description: Polish translation, check readability, ensure native Chinese tone and expression

steps_breakdown.name: Output Generation & Validation
steps_breakdown.description: Generate final Chinese Markdown file and validate completeness

critical_risks.description: source_files parameter is empty. Workflow cannot proceed without source article.
critical_risks.mitigation: Must obtain source file before execution

critical_risks.description: Without knowing article topic/domain, terminology mapping may be inaccurate

medium_risks.description: Speed-priority mode may sacrifice terminology consistency checks
medium_risks.mitigation: Use fast model for initial translation, then targeted review

medium_risks.description: Complex Markdown structures (tables, nested lists) may lose formatting

low_risks.description: Non-standard characters or mixed language content may cause encoding issues

pre_flight_questions.question: 请提供英文新闻文章的来源文件路径或内容
pre_flight_questions.description: source_files 参数为空，需要指定源文件位置或直接提供文章内容

pre_flight_questions.question: 该文章的主题领域是什么？(如：技术、商业、科技新闻、其他)
pre_flight_questions.description: 帮助术语专家进行正确的专业术语映射

pre_flight_questions.question: 是否有特定的术语表、翻译指南或品牌名称约定需要遵循？
pre_flight_questions.description: 用于确保翻译的一致性和准确性

pre_flight_questions.question: 翻译中是否需要保留原文，如：旁注、备注或注释？
pre_flight_questions.description: 影响输出格式和内容处理方式

pre_flight_questions.question: 是否有特定的中文翻译偏好？(如：简体/繁体、正式/非正式语气)
pre_flight_questions.description: 确定翻译风格和表达方式

haiku.rationale: Fast, cost-effective for analysis and validation tasks

sonnet.rationale: Good balance of speed and quality for review tasks

opus.rationale: Highest quality for primary translation task

execution_strategy.parallelization: Limited parallelization possible (Steps 2-3 can run in parallel)
optimization_for_speed: Use haiku for rapid validation steps
Focus QA on format and critical terminology

blocking_issues: Source file must be provided before any work can begin
external_dependencies: Translation guidelines or terminology dictionary (if available)
assumption: Source file will be in plain text or Markdown format
No special formatting or embedded media requiring special handling

summary.task_classification: News Article Translation to Chinese Markdown
summary.feasibility: Feasible once source file is provided
summary.recommended_start: Upon receipt of source file and answers to Q001, Q002, and Q005
summary.success_criteria: Fully translated Markdown file with 95%+ accuracy and native Chinese tone
